snippet.title: Jada Pinkett Smith addresses Will slapping Chris Rock at Oscars
snippet.description:
Sitting down with TODAY’s Hoda Kotb, Jada Pinkett Smith recalls the moment Will Smith walked onto the stage at the 2022 Academy Awards and slapped Chris Rock, followed by a tirade warning him not to mention his wife's name. “We haven’t called each other ‘husband and wife’ in a long time,” she says.

Whitney’s bold and honest reaction showcases her strong personality and provides a glimpse into her tumultuous relationship with Bobby Brown. Don’t miss this iconic exchange that had everyone talking!

ABOUT LATE NIGHT WITH CONAN O’BRIEN
Running from 1993-2009, Late Night with Conan O’Brien is one of the most beloved late night shows in television history. Known for its absurdist humor, hilarious celebrity interviews and featuring the best stand-up comedians and musical acts of the ‘90s and early 2000s. Hosted by Conan O’Brien alongside sidekick Andy Richter and house band Max Weinberg and the Max Weinberg 7, Late Night with Conan O’Brien featured unforgettable segments like “If They Mated”, “In the Year 2000”, “Desk Drive”, and made a breakout star of Triumph the Insult Comic Dog.

snippet.title: Eddie Murphy makes Will Smith slap joke at Golden Globes 2023
snippet.description:
Michelle Yeoh, Cate Blanchette, Steven Spielberg and Colin Farrell were among the winners at the 2023 Goldon Globes as the awards show returned in person for its milestone 80th year.

British and Irish talent fared well at the annual ceremony – one of the first major events of the award season calendar – with several wins for Martin McDonagh’s The Banshees Of Inisherin.

Top awards also went to Austin Butler, Blanchett, and Spielberg, who won best director, as well as the best drama motion picture trophy for his semi-autobiographical film The Fabelmans.

Meanwhile Michelle Yeoh won the award for best performance by an actress in a motion picture, musical or comedy for Everything Everywhere All at Once.

Dr. Phil tells compelling stories about real people. The Dr. Phil Show is an American daytime talk show and TV series with host and personality Dr. Phil McGraw, who offers advice from his experience as a psychologist. The show provides the most comprehensive forum on mental health issues in the history of television. For over a decade, Dr. McGraw has used the show's platform to make psychology accessible to the general public by addressing important personal and social issues. Here on the Dr. Phil YouTube channel, you will find the best moments, highlights, and segments from the TV show. We upload new videos every day, so make sure you subscribe and ring the bell for all notifications, so you don't miss a single one.

Full episodes of the Dr. Phil Show premiere every weekday on CBS, with a new season premiering every fall in 2021, 2022, and 2023. Each full episode contains an interview or multiple interviews with doctors, teens, families, parents, kids, and more. The executive producers are Phil McGraw and showrunner Oprah Winfrey of OWN. Dr. Phil is the top-rated daytime talk show attracting millions of viewers every day alongside other talk shows, including The Ellen Show with Ellen DeGeneres, The Dr. Oz Show, The Kelly Clarkson Show, and The Steve Wilkos Show. Dr. Phil makes regular appearances on The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon, Jimmy Kimmel Live, and The Late Late Show with James Corden. Dr. Phil has also done crossovers with 90 Day Fiancé, Inside Edition, and Marrying Millions.

snippet.title: Oprah Winfrey asks Michael Jackson if he is a virgin 1993 #oprah #oprahwinfrey #michaeljackson #mj
snippet.description:
The interview between Oprah Winfrey and Michael Jackson at his Neverland Ranch home took place on February 10, 1993. The interview was aired on ABC as a primetime special on February 16, 1993.

During the interview, Jackson discussed various aspects of his life, including his childhood, his music career, and his personal relationships. He also addressed the rumors and allegations that had been circulating about him at the time, including allegations of child sexual abuse.

In particular, Jackson strongly denied the allegations of sexual abuse, and Winfrey pressed him on the issue, asking him to explain his relationships with young boys and his practice of sharing his bed with them. Jackson defended himself by saying that his relationships with children were innocent and that he had never harmed anyone.

The interview was seen by millions of viewers and generated a lot of controversy and discussion in the media. It was one of the most-watched interviews of all time and was seen as a turning point in Jackson's career, as many people felt that it damaged his reputation and public image.
